samples.label: Locked FDE hook with sparse v3 direction
samples.text:
[curious] Within fifty-nine days, Anthropic, OpenAI, A W S, and Microsoft all announced a version of the same move.

They put engineers closer to customer operations.

OpenAI, A W S, and Microsoft alone described more than seven and a half billion dollars across different kinds of commitments.

[thoughtful] If model capability were the whole problem, why are model companies spending billions on people?

The numbers are not perfectly comparable, but the shared priority is hard to miss: these companies are building deployment capacity.

Models can already write code, analyze documents, and call tools. What they cannot do by themselves is organize a company's data, permissions, approvals, recovery paths, and responsibility into a reliable production system.

[confident] That gap is where forward deployed engineering becomes important.

settings_matrix.notes: Balanced v3 stability with sparse local delivery cues.

rubric.name: naturalness
rubric.passing_note: Sounds spoken rather than synthesized or announced.

rubric.name: energy
rubric.passing_note: Has forward momentum without sounding theatrical.

rubric.name: authority
rubric.passing_note: Sounds confident enough for a serious technology essay.
